overrides.reason: Chief legal adviser to the government. Legal opinions, prosecutorial policy. Constitutional body.

name_en: Commission for the Investigation of Abuse of Authority

overrides.reason: Constitutional anti-corruption body. Investigates gov misconduct. Authoritative for integrity-related notifications.
Constitutional body. Electoral laws, voter registration, party registration, election schedules.
Lower house of federal parliament. Bills, proceedings, committee reports. Absent from digobikas.
Judicial appointments and discipline. Constitutional body.
Consolidated Acts, Rules, Constitution database. Authoritative reference for legal texts. Absent from digobikas.
Upper house of federal parliament. Bills, proceedings, committee reports. Absent from digobikas.
Constitutional body under Article 248 of the Constitution (2015). Note: uses .org domain rather than .gov.np. A-status accredited per Paris Principles.
Constitutional body. Annual audit reports, financial irregularity findings across all gov bodies.

name_en: Office of the Prime Minister and Council of Ministers

overrides.reason: Office of the Prime Minister and Council of Ministers — cabinet decisions, policy directives, inter-ministerial circulars. Highest executive authority.
Digobikas homepage_url was http://opmcm.gov.np/en which now returns 404. Bare https://opmcm.gov.np/ works (probe 200).

name_en: Office of the President of Nepal

overrides.reason: Constitutional head of state. Appointments, bill assents, ceremonial notifications.
Constitutional body for civil service recruitment. Vacancy notices, exam schedules, syllabi. High citizen-facing value.
Official PSC online application portal. Complements PSC notices for vacancy, application and exam workflow questions.
Authoritative publication record for all laws, rules, notifications, appointments. Nothing becomes law in Nepal until it appears here. Absent from digobikas.
Apex judicial body. Landmark decisions, constitutional interpretations, procedural rules.

before.name_np: श्रम, रोजगार तथा सामाजिक सुरक्षा मन्त्रालय

overrides.reason: Digobikas seed labeled this 'Ministry of Labour, Employment and Social Security' but the URL resolves to the Department of Foreign Employment (a department under MoLESS). Corrected name; demoted to Tier 3 (department, not ministry). The actual ministry URL is moless.gov.np added separately.
Primary health-services delivery department under MoHP.
Industry registration, FDI approvals. Under MoI/CS.

name_en: Department of Labour and Occupational Safety

overrides.reason: Labour-law enforcement, workplace safety. Under MoLESS.

name_en: Department of National ID and Civil Registration

overrides.reason: National ID, birth/death/marriage registration. Under MoHA. Very high citizen-facing value (nagarikta/janmadarta procedures).
National highway planning, contract notices. Under MoPIT.
Survey/napi offices, land maps and geospatial services. Complements DOLMA for land-record and naksa questions.
Outbreak surveillance and response. Under DoHS.
Government-managed provident fund and retirement-benefit service. Common worker-benefit search target.
Official FEIMS portal under Department of Foreign Employment. Supports labour approval and foreign-employment workflows.
Official foreign job search surface under DoFE. Useful for foreign-employment demand and recruitment verification questions.
Reproductive and family health programs. Under DoHS.
Public health-insurance enrollment, benefit and service information. Useful for healthcare access questions.
Visa policy, foreign-national registration. Under MoHA. High citizen-facing traffic.
PAN, VAT, income tax. Direct citizen-facing department under MoF. One of the most-searched gov domains for the helpdesk use case.
MoHA official office directory source. Used for DAO/area/border administration routing, citizenship, national ID, passport routing, local administration contact, and service navigation.
Official lost document recommendation portal for license, billbook and other documents. Directly matches common lost-license/license-replacement questions.
Digital citizen service app covering NID, citizenship, passport, driving license, voter ID, and other linked services.
SEE/Class 11/Class 12 notices, results, verification and exam-service information. Education is one of the highest observed demand categories.
MoHA official office directory source. Used for DAO/area/border administration routing, citizenship, national ID, passport routing, local administration contact, and service navigation.
Passport issuance + e-MRTD. Under MoFA. Very high citizen demand.
MoHA official office directory source. Used for DAO/area/border administration routing, citizenship, national ID, passport routing, local administration contact, and service navigation.
Government-owned statutory public financial organization. Useful for CIT savings, loan and e-service questions.
Company registration under Companies Act 2063. Directly relevant to the 'company registration middleman' problem that motivated this project.
Official Nepal Police clearance certificate portal and verification surface. Common citizen and migration-service query.
Official Nepali mission in Qatar from MoFA diplomatic mission directory. Used for passport-abroad, consular, contact, and emergency routing.
Official SSF employer and contributor online registration/login system. Contains procedural notices for contributors and employers.
Social security schemes, employer/contributor obligations, hospital-rate lists and benefits. High practical citizen/worker value.
